calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Lela Tong, appearing on her own behalf via Court Call Conference. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Court ordered matter under submission. Plaintiff to file written response on or before 7/8/2010. Proceedings not reported. (212)
